title: delissea linearifolia
intro: Delissea linearifolia, also known as the Hawaiian holly fern, is a type of flowering plant species native to Hawaii. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Delissea linearifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. Delissea linearifolia can be prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional Hawaiian herbal preparations, such as poultices and salves, to treat a range of health issues.
